twitter_thread: Scored a $1,200 treadmill for $995 on Prime Day. Here's how to find similar deals.
Weak equipment breaks: 250lb-capacity benches fail 3x more often than 300lb ones.
Good exercise mats cost $15-$30, preventing injuries that cost $100s to treat.
Brand-name kettlebells can be 2x more expensive than identical generic ones.
Adjustable dumbbells like Bowflex save $100-$200 vs. fixed-weight sets.
Last year's model of the NordicTrack treadmill saves $300, with nearly identical features.
What's the most money you've saved on Fitness Gear with a smart purchase? #fitnessgear #frugalfitness
pack.linkedin: I recently scored a $1,200 treadmill for $995 on Prime Day by doing my research. Buying equipment with at least 300lb capacity can prevent breakdowns and injuries, which can cost $100s to treat. Generic kettlebells can be half the price of brand-name ones with identical features. Consider buying last year's model, like the NordicTrack treadmill, which saves $300 with nearly identical features. What's your strategy for finding the best Fitness Gear deals?
